messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Write a Python script using python-pptx to generate an 8-slide rustic creative presentation for agriculture farmers showcasing sustainable farming techniques. The output file must be named "agriculture_sustainable.pptx" and all content should be in German. Use the standard 4:3 Standard slide size. You are strictly prohibited from using any external APIs or web scraping to fetch data; use hardcoded sample data only. When adding charts, you must explicitly use XL_CHART_TYPE instead of importing or using ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Additionally, implement defensive programming by ensuring that any attempt to set text on a title shape first checks if slide.shapes.title is not None before accessing .text. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections, with code enclosed in ```python fences and non-code text in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

COLOR_DARK_GREEN = RGBColor(46, 125, 50)
COLOR_MEDIUM_GREEN = RGBColor(76, 175, 80)
COLOR_LIGHT_GREEN = RGBColor(165, 214, 167)
COLOR_BROWN = RGBColor(141, 110, 99)
COLOR_CREAM = RGBColor(255, 248, 225)
COLOR_WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
COLOR_DARK_TEXT = RGBColor(33, 33, 33)
COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(200, 200, 200)


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex="#FFF8E1"):
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    if color:
        run.font.color.rgb = color
    return txBox


def add_shape(slide, shape_type, left, top, width, height, fill_color=None, line_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(shape_type, left, top, width, height)
    if fill_color:
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = fill_color
    else:
        shape.fill.background()
    if line_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = line_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    return shape


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title_text, body_text, accent_color=None):
    card_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    if accent_color:
        card_shape.fill.solid()
        card_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = accent_color
    else:
        card_shape.fill.background()
    card_shape.line.color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY
    card_shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = title_text
    run_title.font.size = Pt(12)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    if accent_color:
        run_title.font.color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE
    else:
        run_title.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_GREEN

    body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.5), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.6))
    tf_body = body_box.text_frame
    p_body = tf_body.paragraphs[0]
    run_body = p_body.add_run()
    run_body.text = body_text
    run_body.font.size = Pt(10)
    if accent_color:
        run_body.font.color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE
    else:
        run_body.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_TEXT

    return card_shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, position="center"):
    label_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.4))
    tf = label_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text.upper()
    run.font.size = Pt(10)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_MEDIUM_GREEN
    if position == "center":
        p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER


def add_footer(prs, slide, page_number):
    footer_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(8.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(1.2), Inches(0.3))
    tf = footer_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = f"{page_number} / 8"
    run.font.size = Pt(9)
    run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = COLOR_MEDIUM_GREEN
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(2)
        label_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(height.inches / 2 - 0.15), width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3))
        tf = label_box.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = "Bild-Platzhalter"
        run.font.size = Pt(10)
        run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_GREEN


def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#2E7D32")

    add_shape(slide, MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(4.5), Inches(0.8), Inches(1.5), Inches(1.5), fill_color=COLOR_LIGHT_GREEN)
    add_shape(slide, MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(6.5), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.8), Inches(0.8), fill_color=COLOR_MEDIUM_GREEN)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(1.0), Inches(1.5), Inches(8.0), Inches(1.5))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = "Nachhaltige Landwirtschaft"
    run_title.font.size = Pt(44)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE

    subtitle_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(1.5), Inches(3.2), Inches(7.0), Inches(0.8))
    tf_sub = subtitle_box.text_frame
    p_sub = tf_sub.paragraphs[0]
    run_sub = p_sub.add_run()
    run_sub.text = "Techniken für eine grünere Zukunft"
    run_sub.font.size = Pt(24)
    run_sub.font.color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT_GREEN

    add_footer(prs, slide, 1)


def slide_02_introduction(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFF8E1")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Was ist nachhaltige Landwirtschaft?"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.6), "Was ist nachhaltige Landwirtschaft?", 28, True, COLOR_DARK_GREEN)

    card1 = add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.2), Inches(4.2), Inches(2.5),
                     "Definition",
                     "Nachhaltige Landwirtschaft zielt darauf ab, Nahrungsmittel zu produzieren, ohne die natürlichen Ressourcen zu erschöpfen und gleichzeitig die Umwelt zu schützen.",
                     COLOR_DARK_GREEN)

    card2 = add_card(slide, Inches(5.3), Inches(1.2), Inches(4.2), Inches(2.5),
                     "Ziele",
                     "Bodenfruchtbarkeit erhalten, Wasser sparen, Biodiversität fördern und klimafreundlich wirtschaften.",
                     COLOR_MEDIUM_GREEN)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(4.0), Inches(9), Inches(2.5),
                 "• Bodenfruchtbarkeit langfristig erhalten\n• Wasserverbrauch reduzieren\n• Biodiversität und Artenvielfalt fördern\n• Klimafreundliche Anbaumethoden einsetzen\n• Chemische Pestizide minimieren",
                 14, False, COLOR_DARK_TEXT)

    add_footer(prs, slide, 2)


def slide_03_crop_rotation(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFF8E1")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Fruchtwechsel-Techniken"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.6), "Fruchtwechsel-Techniken", 28, True, COLOR_DARK_GREEN)

    add_shape(slide, MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(4.7), Inches(1.2), Inches(0.5), Inches(0.5), fill_color=COLOR_LIGHT_GREEN)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(4.6), Inches(1.3), Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), "→", 20, True, COLOR_MEDIUM_GREEN)

    card1 = add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(2.7), Inches(2.0),
                     "Leguminosen",
                     "Bohnen, Erbsen und Klee binden Stickstoff aus der Luft und reichern den Boden mit Nährstoffen an.",
                     COLOR_DARK_GREEN)

    card2 = add_card(slide, Inches(3.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(2.7), Inches(2.0),
                     "Kornfrüchte",
                     "Weizen, Gerste und Hafer nutzen die angereicherten Nährstoffe effizient aus.",
                     COLOR_MEDIUM_GREEN)

    card3 = add_card(slide, Inches(6.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(2.7), Inches(2.0),
                     "Wurzelgemüse",
                     "Karotten und Kartoffeln lockern den Boden auf und verbessern die Struktur.",
                     COLOR_BROWN)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(4.3), Inches(9), Inches(1.5),
                 "Vorteile des Fruchtwechsels:\n• Verbesserte Bodengesundheit\n• Reduzierter Schädlingsbefall\n• Gleichmäßige Nährstoffverteilung\n• Höhere Erträge über mehrere Jahre",
                 14, False, COLOR_DARK_TEXT)

    add_footer(prs, slide, 3)


def slide_04_organic_pest_management(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFF8E1")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Biologischer Pflanzenschutz"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.6), "Biologischer Pflanzenschutz", 28, True, COLOR_DARK_GREEN)

    card1 = add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.2), Inches(4.2), Inches(1.7),
                     "Nützlinge fördern",
                     "Marienkäfer und Schlupfwespen bekämpfen Blattläuse natürlich.",
                     COLOR_DARK_GREEN)

    card2 = add_card(slide, Inches(5.3), Inches(1.2), Inches(4.2), Inches(1.7),
                     "Mischkulturen",
                     "Verschiedene Pflanzen nebeneinander reduzieren Schädlingsdruck.",
                     COLOR_MEDIUM_GREEN)

    card3 = add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(3.2), Inches(4.2), Inches(1.7),
                     "Pflanzenstärkung",
                     "Brennnesseljauche und Knoblauchsbrühe stärken die Pflanzen.",
                     COLOR_BROWN)

    card4 = add_card(slide, Inches(5.3), Inches(3.2), Inches(4.2), Inches(1.7),
                     "Mechanischer Schutz",
                     "Insektennetze und Fallen schützen vor Schädlingen ohne Chemie.",
                     COLOR_DARK_GREEN)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(5.3), Inches(9), Inches(1.2),
                 "Vorteile biologischer Methoden:\n• Keine schädlichen Rückstände\n• Erhaltung der Biodiversität\n• Langfristig kostengünstiger",
                 14, False, COLOR_DARK_TEXT)

    add_footer(prs, slide, 4)


def slide_05_water_conservation(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFF8E1")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Wasserschutz und Bewässerung"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.6), "Wasserschutz und Bewässerung", 28, True, COLOR_DARK_GREEN)

    card1 = add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.2), Inches(4.2), Inches(2.0),
                     "Tropfbewässerung",
                     "Präzise Wassergabe direkt an die Wurzeln spart bis zu 60% Wasser im Vergleich zur herkömmlichen Bewässerung.",
                     COLOR_DARK_GREEN)

    card2 = add_card(slide, Inches(5.3), Inches(1.2), Inches(4.2), Inches(2.0),
                     "Mulchen",
                     "Organische Abdeckungen reduzieren die Verdunstung und halten den Boden feucht.",
                     COLOR_MEDIUM_GREEN)

    card3 = add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(3.6), Inches(4.2), Inches(1.8),
                     "Regenwassernutzung",
                     "Sammeln von Regenwasser in Zisternen für die Bewässerung.",
                     COLOR_BROWN)

    card4 = add_card(slide, Inches(5.3), Inches(3.6), Inches(4.2), Inches(1.8),
                     "Bodenbedeckung",
                     "Zwischenfrüchte und Gründüngung schützen den Boden vor Austrocknung.",
                     COLOR_DARK_GREEN)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(5.7), Inches(9), Inches(1.2),
                 "Wassereinsparung durch nachhaltige Methoden:\n• Bis zu 60% weniger Wasserverbrauch\n• Verbesserte Wasserhaltefähigkeit des Bodens\n• Schutz vor Erosion und Auswaschung",
                 14, False, COLOR_DARK_TEXT)

    add_footer(prs, slide, 5)


def slide_06_soil_health(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFF8E1")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Bodengesundheit verbessern"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.6), "Bodengesundheit verbessern", 28, True, COLOR_DARK_GREEN)

    card1 = add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.2), Inches(4.2), Inches(2.2),
                     "Kompostwirtschaft",
                     "Organische Abfälle zu wertvollem Kompost verarbeiten und dem Boden zurückführen.",
                     COLOR_DARK_GREEN)

    card2 = add_card(slide, Inches(5.3), Inches(1.2), Inches(4.2), Inches(2.2),
                     "Gründüngung",
                     "Zwischenfrüchte wie Klee und Phacelia schützen und düngen den Boden.",
                     COLOR_MEDIUM_GREEN)

    card3 = add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(3.8), Inches(4.2), Inches(1.7),
                     "Reduzierte Bodenbearbeitung",
                     "Pflügen minimieren schützt die Bodenstruktur und das Bodenleben.",
                     COLOR_BROWN)

    card4 = add_card(slide, Inches(5.3), Inches(3.8), Inches(4.2), Inches(1.7),
                     "Bodenbedeckung",
                     "Dauerhafte Bedeckung verhindert Erosion und fördert das Bodenleben.",
                     COLOR_DARK_GREEN)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(5.8), Inches(9), Inches(1.2),
                 "Gesunder Boden ist die Grundlage:\n• Höhere Erträge\n• Bessere Wasserhaltefähigkeit\n• Mehr Kohlenstoffspeicherung",
                 14, False, COLOR_DARK_TEXT)

    add_footer(prs, slide, 6)


def slide_07_benefits_chart(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFF8E1")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Vorteile nachhaltiger Landwirtschaft"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.6), "Vorteile nachhaltiger Landwirtschaft", 28, True, COLOR_DARK_GREEN)

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Bodenertrag", "Wassereffizienz", "Biodiversität", "Klimaschutz"]
    chart_data.add_series("Nachhaltig", (85, 90, 78, 82))
    chart_data.add_series("Konventionell", (100, 60, 45, 35))

    left = Inches(1.0)
    top = Inches(1.5)
    width = Inches(8.0)
    height = Inches(4.5)

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.gap_width = 120

    series_0 = plot.series[0]
    series_0.format.fill.solid()
    series_0.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_MEDIUM_GREEN

    series_1 = plot.series[1]
    series_1.format.fill.solid()
    series_1.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_BROWN

    value_axis = chart.value_axis
    value_axis.maximum_scale = 120
    value_axis.has_title = True
    value_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].add_run().text = "Prozent"

    category_axis = chart.category_axis
    category_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(11)

    legend = chart.legend
    legend.font.size = Pt(12)

    add_footer(prs, slide, 7)


def slide_08_conclusion(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#2E7D32")

    add_shape(slide, MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(4.5), Inches(1.0), Inches(1.2), Inches(1.2), fill_color=COLOR_LIGHT_GREEN)
    add_shape(slide, MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(6.8), Inches(3.0), Inches(0.7), Inches(0.7), fill_color=COLOR_MEDIUM_GREEN)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(1.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(7.0), Inches(1.0))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = "Gemeinsam für eine nachhaltige Zukunft"
    run_title.font.size = Pt(36)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE

    body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(1.5), Inches(3.2), Inches(7.0), Inches(2.5))
    tf_body = body_box.text_frame
    p_body = tf_body.paragraphs[0]
    run_body = p_body.add_run()
    run_body.text = "Jeder Bauer kann einen Beitrag leisten:\n\n• Nachhaltige Methoden anwenden\n• Ressourcen schonend wirtschaften\n• Die Natur als Partner verstehen\n• Für kommende Generationen sorgen"
    run_body.font.size = Pt(18)
    run_body.font.color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT_GREEN

    add_footer(prs, slide, 8)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_introduction(prs)
    slide_03_crop_rotation(prs)
    slide_04_organic_pest_management(prs)
    slide_05_water_conservation(prs)
    slide_06_soil_health(prs)
    slide_07_benefits_chart(prs)
    slide_08_conclusion(prs)

    prs.save("agriculture_sustainable.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
